TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sudadatan, title = Sudadatan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sudadatan} }

S.FORM: alang Sudadatan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 573 buwan, 1,495 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 296 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 1,199 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 10%, Amis 8%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sudadatan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga Pibutingan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sudadatan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 573 buwan, 1,495 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 296 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 1,199 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 10%, Amis 8%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sudadatan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga Pibutingan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēu*a*atan …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu s~…ēin ¶~ ®ima …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, truku **%, amis~…ē *%, tajan *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēu*a*atan ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na s~…ēu*a*atan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēu*a*atan ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēu*a*atan ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēu*a*atan ńßja Ē …£a piő≤utiŇčan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
